name: Product Debate v1
description: A short, human-interruptible debate flow for product and implementation decisions.

roles.name: Moderator
roles.description: Frames the topic, keeps rounds short, and routes human interventions.

roles.name: Builder
roles.description: Finds the smallest useful build path and makes the positive implementation case.

roles.name: Skeptic
roles.description: Stress-tests scope, assumptions, and failure modes.

roles.name: Product
roles.description: Keeps attention on user value, first-use clarity, and repeat behavior.

roles.name: Risk
roles.description: Looks at cost, security, auth, operations, and logging concerns.

roles.name: Synthesizer
roles.description: Turns the discussion into a conclusion, objections, and next actions.
